auth_methods: REQUIRED: every .tf must contain a `provider "xcsh" {}` block. Without it Terraform errors: "Provider requires explicit configuration. Add a provider block".
Configure exactly ONE auth method, via environment variables (preferred) or explicit arguments in the provider block:
api_p12_file + p12_password (env XCSH_P12_FILE + XCSH_P12_PASSWORD) — PKCS#12 certificate authentication.
api_cert + api_key (env XCSH_CERT + XCSH_KEY) — PEM certificate authentication.
api_url (env XCSH_API_URL) — tenant base URL without /api suffix, e.g. https://your-tenant.console.ves.volterra.io.
syntax_rules: OneOf selectors: use empty block `field {}`, never `field = true`
Cross-resource refs: block with name + namespace attributes
Fields marked "Server applies default when omitted" can be safely omitted

categories.name: Security
categories.description: WAF, bot defense, rate limiting, firewall policies, and security controls

categories.name: Networking
categories.description: Virtual networks, BGP, cloud connectivity, tunnels, and network interfaces

categories.name: Load Balancing
categories.description: HTTP/TCP/UDP/CDN load balancers, origin pools, health checks, and routing
categories.dependency_chain:
namespace → healthcheck → origin_pool → http_loadbalancer
namespace → origin_pool → tcp_loadbalancer

categories.name: Sites
categories.description: AWS/Azure/GCP VPC sites, SecureMesh, VoltStack, and site mesh groups

categories.name: Kubernetes
categories.description: Container registries, workloads, and Kubernetes integrations

categories.name: DNS
categories.description: DNS domains, zones, compliance checks, and DNS proxy configuration

categories.name: API Security
categories.description: API definition, discovery, testing, and security controls for web APIs

categories.name: Applications
categories.description: Application settings, types, discovery, and filtering

categories.name: Certificates
categories.description: TLS certificates, certificate chains, CRLs, and trusted CA lists

categories.name: Monitoring
categories.description: Log receivers, alert policies, APM, and global logging configuration

categories.name: Authentication
categories.description: Authentication methods, cloud credentials, and secret management

categories.name: BIG-IP Integration
categories.description: BIG-IP proxy, data groups, and iRules integration

categories.name: Cloud Resources
categories.description: Cloud elastic IPs, address allocators, and geo-location resources

categories.name: Organization
categories.description: Namespaces, tenant configuration, and organizational settings

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: External integrations including code base and ticket tracking

categories.name: Service Mesh
categories.description: Service mesh policies and traffic management

address_allocator.description: Address Allocator will create an address allocator object in 'system' namespace of the user

advertise_policy.description: Advertise_policy object controls how and where a service represented by a given virtual_host object is advertised to consumers. configuration
advertise_policy.minimal_config:
resource "xcsh_advertise_policy" "example" {
  name      = "example-advertise-policy"
  namespace = "system"

  address         = "example-value"
  protocol        = "example-value"
  skip_xff_append = true
}

cluster.description: Cluster will create the object in the storage backend for namespace metadata.namespace
cluster.minimal_config:
resource "xcsh_cluster" "example" {
  name      = "example-cluster"
  namespace = "staging"

  connection_timeout     = 1
  endpoint_selection     = "DISTRIBUTED"
  fallback_policy        = "NO_FALLBACK"
  http_idle_timeout      = 1
  loadbalancer_algorithm = "ROUND_ROBIN"
}

  timeout             = 1

}

udp_loadbalancer.description: Load balancing UDP traffic across origin pools
udp_loadbalancer.minimal_config:

  name      = "example-udp-loadbalancer"
  namespace = "staging"

  domains                          = ["example-value"]
  dns_volterra_managed             = true
  enable_per_packet_load_balancing = true
  idle_timeout                     = 1
}

user_identification.description: User_identification creates a new object in the storage backend for metadata.namespace

virtual_host.description: Virtual host in a given namespace
virtual_host.minimal_config:
resource "xcsh_virtual_host" "example" {
  name      = "example-virtual-host"
  namespace = "staging"

  domains                     = ["example-value"]
  request_cookies_to_remove   = ["example-value"]
  request_headers_to_remove   = ["example-value"]
  response_cookies_to_remove  = ["example-value"]
  response_headers_to_remove  = ["example-value"]
  add_location                = true
  connection_idle_timeout     = 1
  disable_default_error_pages = true
  disable_dns_resolve         = true
  idle_timeout                = 1
  max_request_header_size     = 1
  proxy                       = "UDP_PROXY"
}
